studyName: Integrative Genomic and Transcriptomic Analyses of Refractory Multiple Myeloma

tables.description: This sample attributes table contains sample IDs, body site where sample was collected, analyte type, tumor status, histological type, age when sample was collected, primary tumor, metastasis, or transformed cell line, tumor location, and tumor treatment.

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: PRIMARY_METASTATIC_TUMOR
variables.description: Primary tumor, metastasis, or transformed cell line

variables.name: TUMOR_TREATMENT
variables.description: Type of tumor treatment for sample

tables.description: This subject consent data table contains subject IDs and consent information.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

tables.description: This data table contains a mapping of study subject IDs to sample IDs. Samples are the final preps submitted for genotyping, sequencing, and/or expression data. For example, if one patient (subject ID) gave one sample, and that sample was processed differently to generate 2 sequencing runs, there would be two rows, both using the same subject ID, but having 2 unique sample IDs.
This subject phenotypes data table contains subject IDs and case control status of the subject for Multiple Myeloma (MM). All subjects are MM patients.

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Case control status of the subject for Multiple Myeloma
